content: Hello, Arif! How can I assist you today?
I am teaching GenAI course to MS students at Department of Data Science

That sounds great, Arif! Teaching a course on Generative AI is an exciting opportunity, especially given the rapid advancements in the field. What specific topics are you covering in your course, or how can I assist you with your teaching?
Can you tell me a joke about GenAI

Sure! Here’s a light-hearted joke about Generative AI:

Why did the Generative AI break up with its partner?

Because it just couldn’t generate any more interest! 

I hope that brings a smile to your face! If you need more jokes or anything else, let me know!
I love dogs and my pet dog name is "Zoro"
That's wonderful! Dogs make great companions. Zoro is a cool name! What breed is Zoro, and what are some of your favorite things to do together?
